headline: Microsoft is letting Office users remove an annoying Copilot button
summary: Microsoft will allow Office users to disable the floating Copilot button. The button obstructed cells in Excel, frustrating many users. Updates are rolling out next week to address the issue.

headline: Anker’s new earbuds are the first with its AI chip that boosts noise reduction
summary: Anker launched new Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro earbuds with its new Thus AI audio chip. The AI chip enhances noise reduction capabilities for clearer calls. It's designed to improve voice clarity even in noisy environments.

headline: Anker’s new earbuds have the best call quality I’ve ever heard
summary: Soundcore's new Liberty 5 Pro earbuds aim for high-end audio performance. They utilize Anker's new Thus chip for superior processing power. A review highlights their exceptional call quality, setting them apart.

headline: States ask judge to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster
summary: Over 30 states are petitioning a federal judge to dismantle Live Nation-Ticketmaster. They request a sale of the ticketing giant and limitations on its venue promotions. The states argue for structural changes to combat anti-competitive practices.

headline: For All Mankind Season 5, Episode 9 Review — "Sons and Daughters"
summary: "Sons and Daughters" is described as a messy penultimate episode. The review critiques an overall rocky season for For All Mankind. It offers an assessment of the episode's narrative and quality.

headline: Save Over 50% Off the Sonos Sub Wireless Subwoofer During the Memorial Day Sale
summary: The Sonos Sub wireless subwoofer is available at over 50% off. This Memorial Day sale offers certified refurbished units. Refurbished models come with the same 1-year warranty as new products.

headline: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 for PC Drops to $17.99 (or Less)
summary: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 for PC is now available for $17.99. This deal is part of a Humble Choice offering. It presents a significant discount for fans of the franchise.

headline: The Sonos Arc Ultra Soundbar Just Dropped to the Lowest Price Ever During the Sonos Memorial Day Sale
summary: The Sonos Arc Ultra soundbar has reached its lowest price ever. This offer is part of the Memorial Day sale. Certified refurbished units include a full 1-year Sonos warranty.

headline: Parents of Southport survivors say anonymity has erased their girls from the story
summary: Parents of Southport knife attack survivors criticize anonymity orders. They feel the orders have marginalized their children's experiences. Insufficient support for the girls is also a key concern.

headline: Andrew investigation could look into sexual misconduct allegations
summary: An ongoing investigation into 'Andrew' may now include sexual misconduct claims. He was arrested earlier on suspicion of public office misconduct. The scope of the inquiry appears to be widening.

headline: Stop blaming young people for being unemployed, says Amazon's UK boss
summary: Amazon's UK boss, John Boumphrey, urges against blaming young job seekers. He suggests the education system struggles to prepare youth for work. Boumphrey advocates for improved readiness programs for young people.

headline: Guardiola to leave Man City after 10 years as boss
summary: Pep Guardiola will depart Manchester City at the season's end. He concludes a highly successful decade as the club's manager. Man City confirms his departure after unparalleled achievements.
